title: amazon-utac v0.1.0: UTAC Analysis of Amazon Rainforest Resilience and Tipping Dynamics
description: amazon-utac v0.1.0 applies UTAC (Universal Threshold Activation Criticality) to Amazon rainforest vegetation resilience indicators, deforestation time series, and precipitation–evapotranspiration feedbacks. The UTAC-Logistic ODE detects self-organized critical thresholds in ecosystem resilience loss, providing early-warning signals of potential savannification tipping. CREP metrics measure coherence and emergence in biome-scale feedback dynamics. Part of the GenesisAeon UTAC application suite (genesis-os). Dual-licensed: GPLv3-or-later (code) + CC BY 4.0 (documentation).
